nasb.text: For thus says the Lord God, “Because you have clapped your hands and stamped your feet and rejoiced with all the scorn of your soul against the land of Israel,

esv.text: For thus says the Lord God: Because you have clapped your hands and stamped your feet and rejoiced with all the malice within your soul against the land of Israel,

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：因為你手舞足蹈，心存輕蔑，因以色列地的遭遇而歡喜。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说，‘你们看到以色列的灾祸，便幸灾乐祸，手舞足蹈。
